meta.name: ReSet Call Points
meta.description: Resettable manual call points for fire alarm systems
meta.heroTitle: Resettable Manual Call Point with Break-Glass Simulation
meta.heroDescription:
Resettable manual call point simulating break-glass activation without glass replacement. Visible activation indicator with key-operated reset for immediate reuse.

Available in multiple colours with flush, surface or dual mounting configurations and four electrical arrangements, including standard fire and Sav-wire models.

Intended for fire alarm systems requiring rapid reset and reduced maintenance.

options.01: #01 Standard fire model with 470/680 Ω resistor, Series 01
options.05: #05 Sav-wire (2-wire) with 470/680 Ω resistor and diode, Series 05
